## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Linked issue / discussion

If this PR relates to an issue or discussion, link it here.

## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/verify_acceptance.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added for new behavior (or explanation if not applicable)
- [ ] `bash scripts/check-busytok-naming.sh` clean
- [ ] No `autoken` references in user-visible surfaces (README, install text, badges)
- [ ] No prompt/response bodies or credentials in logs / commits
- [ ] Conventional Commits PR title

## Notes for reviewer

Anything non-obvious about the approach, tradeoffs made, or follow-ups deferred.
